title: hieracium viride subsp. intricatum
intro: Hieracium viride subsp. intricatum is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the green hawk's beard plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The plant's medicinal properties also include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Hieracium viride subsp. intricatum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be applied topically as a salve or cream to take advantage of its health benefits.
